tracks.track_goal: Use Hermes autonomous execution to test a strict-causal feature GRU mainline on the current joints target.
Use Hermes autonomous execution to test a strict-causal feature TCN mainline on the current joints target.
Probe whether phase-state conditioning improves continuity and hard-joint behavior for feature-sequence LSTMs.
Probe whether phase-state features help cheap tree models recover gain and lag on hard joints.
tracks.smoke_command: .venv/bin/python scripts/train_tree_baseline.py --dataset-config configs/datasets/walk_matched_v1_64clean_joints_smoke.yaml --epochs 1 --batch-size 0 --seed 0 --final-eval --feature-bin-ms 100.0 --feature-family lmp+hg_power+phase_state --feature-reducers mean --signal-preprocess car_notch_bandpass --model-family xgboost --xgb-n-estimators 128 --target-axes xyz
tracks.formal_command: .venv/bin/python scripts/train_tree_baseline.py --dataset-config configs/datasets/walk_matched_v1_64clean_joints.yaml --epochs 1 --batch-size 0 --seed 0 --final-eval --feature-bin-ms 100.0 --feature-family lmp+hg_power+phase_state --feature-reducers mean --signal-preprocess car_notch_bandpass --model-family xgboost --xgb-n-estimators 256 --target-axes xyz

tracks.track_goal: Check whether DMD/sDM-style features are already useful with a cheap ridge decoder.
